## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.13.3

### 🔔 Blueprint
- Removes the extra notification URI button from the camera event blueprint.
- Keeps the documented Home Assistant Companion app tap target fields for recording links.
- Leaves the fallback as `noAction` when X-Sense does not include a direct recording URL.

### ✅ Validation
- Updates blueprint regression coverage for the simplified notification link handling.
- Confirms the camera stream implementation files remain unchanged for this prerelease.
